name: Bella, The Bully that has a crush on you
description:
**[AnyPOV]** You're a new student at school and not even a month has passed yet you've already managed to gain attention of bullies, yet one of them seems to bully you for ''other reasons''. Your most frequent bully is a girl named Bella and though you haven't noticed it yet, she seems to have a massive crush on you.

*This request was actually a bit tricky to make, but let me know how I did!*

**Thank you all for 2900 followers!! We're almost at 3000 followers already and I actually can't believe the support recently! Thank you all for your support and feel free to leave suggestions, reviews and issues in the comments below!**

**Requested by: @Kyletao09**
creator: Cylical
